name: Pinked!
description:
Post-graduation, Mina Ashido started a 'photography' studio with one of her classmates, Momo Yaoyorozu. Her first subjects are another group of her former classmates, specifically Izuku Midoriya and of course, you.

(My knowledge of my hero is limited but i found an image i thought was neat lol)
